text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe... Have you seen a small elephant plushie
anywhere around here?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...The one you had on your tote bag?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If that's the one, I found it in the corridor, so I put
it on your desk.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? Thanks so much, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you knew it was mine? I didn't know you
paid such close attention to my plushies. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: N-no... It's just so ugly that it's hard to forget.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aw... but that's what makes it cute, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, let me get you one as thanks!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Then we can be plushie pals! Okay? ♪
